articles.title: RDE-DR: robust deep ensemble CNNs for automated diabetic retinopathy detection from fundus images.
articles.abstract: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of preventable blindness, motivating the development of reliable automated screening systems. This work proposes a Robust Deep Ensemble for Diabetic Retinopathy detection (RDE-DR) by analyzing ensemble fusion strategies. Four pre-trained convolutional neural networks (ResNet50, VGG16, VGG19, and DenseNet121) are trained using CLAHE-enhanced APTOS 2019 fundus images and integrated through seven heterogeneous fusion mechanisms, including voting-based, rank-based, and fuzzy-integral-inspired strategies. A consistent evaluation protocol is adopted, incorporating threshold optimization and probabilistic calibration analysis to validate robustness, decision margins, and accuracy-precision trade-offs. Experimental results show that multiple fusion techniques achieve comparable high performance and stable behavior on the APTOS 2019 benchmark, with the best configuration reaching 98.64% accuracy, 98.40% precision, 98.92% recall, 98.66% F1-score, and 99.78% Area-Under-Curve (AUC). Beyond peak accuracy, the study provides insights into ensemble reliability, calibration characteristics, and practical design choices for medical image classification systems. These results show that integrating transfer learning with CLAHE preprocessing and ensemble fusion yields stable experimental performance on the APTOS 2019 benchmark, suggesting potential for future medical decision support.
articles.authors: Aiche Ishaq, Brik Youcef, Attallah Bilal, Bouguerra Oussama, Rabehi Abdelaziz et al.
articles.specialty: 医療AI・デジタルヘルス
articles.summary_ja: 眼底画像からの糖尿病網膜症自動検出のための堅牢な深層学習アンサンブル手法（RDE-DR）を提案。4つの事前訓練CNN（ResNet50、VGG16、VGG19、DenseNet121）を統合し、7つの融合戦略を検証。APTOS 2019眼底画像を用いて評価。
articles.impact: 糖尿病網膜症スクリーニング自動化技術の導入可能性を内科で検討
articles.memo: 当院の糖尿病内科で網膜症スクリーニングを効率化できる可能性。眼科連携の強化と合わせて検討価値あり。

articles.title: Complication Risk Classification in Children and Adolescents With Type 1 Diabetes: Interpretable Machine Learning Study Based on Saudi Clinical Guidelines.
articles.abstract: Complication risks in children and adolescents with type 1 diabetes (T1D) can lead to serious health outcomes if not detected early. Despite the availability of clinical data, there remains a gap in interpretable tools that support risk stratification in this age group, particularly in alignment with local clinical guidelines. The purpose of this study is to develop a clinically interpretable model that classifies the risk levels of T1D complications-acute, chronic, and low-using real-world data and expert clinical rules derived from the Saudi Diabetes Clinical Practice Guidelines. A pediatric T1D dataset comprising of 306 patients was preprocessed through structured cleaning and feature engineering. Risk labels were constructed using Saudi Diabetes Clinical Practice Guidelines-derived rules. Feature selection was performed using a hybrid approach that combined the SHAP (Shapley Additive Explanations) analysis with exhaustive feature selection. A decision tree model was trained and optimized via cross-validation, using the F1-score as the primary performance metric. The final model achieved a high mean F1-score of 0.9876 with a low variance of 0.0189, using only 5 clinical features: BMI, hypoglycemia, disease duration, hemoglobin A1c, and impaired glucose metabolism. These features were consistently ranked as the most influential. The resulting decision tree offered a transparent logic path, enhancing its clinical interpretability and usability. This study demonstrates that a simple and interpretable model, guided by national clinical guidelines, can effectively predict the risk levels of T1D complications in children and adolescents. Its strong performance, clarity, and reliance on a small number of clinically meaningful features make it a promising candidate for integration into clinical decision support systems. This supports a shift toward predictive and personalized diabetes care.
articles.authors: Fllatah Jalilah, Banjar Haneen
articles.specialty: 医療AI・デジタルヘルス
articles.summary_ja: 小児・青年1型糖尿病患者の合併症リスク分類のための解釈可能な機械学習研究。サウジアラビアの臨床ガイドラインに基づき、306名の患者データから急性・慢性・低リスクの3段階でリスク層別化モデルを開発。実世界データと専門医ルールを活用。
articles.impact: 小児科での1型糖尿病管理における合併症リスク評価システム導入を検討
articles.memo: 当院小児科で1型糖尿病患者管理に活用できる可能性。リスク層別化により早期介入と効率的フォローアップが実現。

articles.title: Sustained on/off-treatment disease control with abrocitinib for moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis.
articles.abstract: Achieving sustained on- and off-treatment disease control is an important therapeutic goal in atopic dermatitis (AD). This study evaluated achievement of off-treatment disease control in patients randomized to placebo following 12 weeks of abrocitinib 200 mg. In the phase 3 JADE REGIMEN study, patients with moderate-to-severe AD who achieved Investigator's Global Assessment (IGA) of 0/1 (with ≥2 grades of improvement) and ≥75% improvement in Eczema Area and Severity Index (EASI) after 12 weeks of abrocitinib 200 mg were randomized (1:1:1) to placebo, abrocitinib 100 mg, or abrocitinib 200 mg for 40 weeks. This post-hoc analysis evaluated patients by flare status (protocol flare definition: ≥50% loss of initial EASI post-randomization response and IGA score ≥2). EASI, IGA, Peak Pruritus Numerical Rating Scale (PP-NRS), and Dermatology Life Quality Index (DLQI) were evaluated. There were no off-treatment flares in 21.3% of patients in the placebo arm. The no-flare group had EASI, IGA, PP-NRS, and DLQI mean scores indicating clear/mild AD at week 52 (2.9, 1.0, 2.6, and 3.5, respectively). After 12 weeks of abrocitinib 200 mg, some patients achieved 40 weeks of sustained off-treatment disease control, with assessments demonstrating clear/mild AD, suggesting attainment of disease remission. NCT03627767.
articles.authors: Guttman-Yassky Emma, Bieber Thomas, Kabashima Kenji, Gutermuth Jan, Weidinger Stephan et al.
articles.summary_ja: 中等度から重度のアトピー性皮膚炎に対するアブロシチニブの持続的疾患コントロール効果を評価。第3相JADE REGIMEN試験で、12週間治療後にIGA 0/1およびEASI 75%改善を達成した患者を対象に、治療中止後の疾患制御維持を検証。
articles.memo: 皮膚科疾患の治療選択肢として参考程度。当院の診療科目には直接関連せず。

articles.title: Frailty and the confidence to plan ahead: Decision-making self-efficacy and advance care planning among older adults receiving home healthcare.
articles.abstract: The relationship between frailty, self-efficacy, and advance care planning (ACP) remains unclear in Asia. This study examined how frailty status relates to decisional self-efficacy, ACP engagement, and advance directive completion among older adults receiving home healthcare in Taiwan. A cross-sectional analysis was conducted using baseline data from a nationwide cohort in Taiwan. Participants (N = 358) were categorized by Clinical Frailty Scale (CFS): mildly frail (CFS 4-5, n = 60), moderately frail (CFS 6, n = 83), severely frail (CFS 7, n = 147), and very severely frail (CFS 8-9, n = 68). ACP engagement and decision-making self-efficacy were assessed using Likert scales. Patients with greater frailty had lower odds of high decisional self-efficacy (CFS: 8-9: odds ratio [OR] = 0.38, 95% confidence interval [CI] = 0.14-1.07) but higher odds of ACP engagement (CFS: 6: OR = 3.38, 95% CI = 1.40-8.17; CFS: 7: OR = 2.52, 95% CI = 1.08-5.89) compared with mildly frail individuals. However, this increase did not extend linearly to the very severely frail group. Advance directive completion remained low across all frailty levels (4.8-10.0%) and was not significantly associated with frailty status. Frailty was associated with lower decisional self-efficacy but higher readiness for ACP, revealing a divergence between perceived confidence and planning motivation. Despite greater engagement, advance directive completion remained low. Stage-sensitive, values-based approaches may help bridge the gap between intention and documentation across the frailty spectrum.
articles.authors: Huang Chi Hsien, Lin Cheng-Pei, Chen Kelly Yen-Chih, Liao Jung-Yu, Cheng Shao-Yi et al.
articles.summary_ja: 台湾の在宅医療を受ける高齢者における虚弱性と意思決定自己効力感、事前ケア計画との関係を検討した横断研究。358名を臨床虚弱尺度で4群に分類し、虚弱度が高いほど意思決定自己効力感と事前指示書作成率が低下することを確認。
articles.memo: 高齢患者の事前ケア計画支援の参考になるが、当院の主要診療領域との直接的関連は限定的。

articles.title: Absolute Eczema Area and Severity Index Responses with Lebrikizumab in Patients with Moderate-to-severe Atopic Dermatitis: A Secondary Analysis of Two Phase 3 Trials.
articles.abstract: The ADvocate trials (NCT04146363, NCT04178967) investigated adults/adolescents with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis (AD) receiving lebrikizumab (LEB) monotherapy, using percent improvement in the Eczema Area and Severity Index (EASI). In clinical trials, percent EASI improvement is used to compare study arms and measure treatment effect size/impact. In clinical practice, however, absolute EASI scores are used (especially in Europe), as they measure an individual's disease state regardless of baseline severity. This post-hoc analysis assessed absolute EASI response - EASI≤7, ≤5, ≤3, and ≤1 - from the ADvocate trials to understand LEB efficacy in adults/adolescents with moderate-to-severe AD. Week-16 data from patients receiving LEB 250 mg Q2W (n=564) were compared with placebo (n=287). Across baseline moderate/severe/very severe EASI and baseline Investigator's Global Assessment (IGA) 3/4, significantly higher percentages of patients receiving LEB than those receiving placebo achieved each absolute EASI response. Week--16 LEB EASI 75 responders (n=284) and per-protocol LEB non-responders (n=215) were assessed through week 52. Absolute EASI scores were generally low and stable among responders and reduced among non-responders. Overall, LEB was associated with high rates of durable absolute EASI response, even in cases of high baseline severity or suboptimal week-16 outcomes. Results reflect clinically meaningful improvements that could help guide clinical practice.
articles.authors: Thaçi Diamant, Puig Luis, Motegi Sei-Ichiro, Papp Kim, Stein Gold Linda et al.
articles.summary_ja: 中等度から重度のアトピー性皮膚炎患者におけるレブリキズマブの絶対的EASI反応を評価した第3相試験の二次解析。ADvocate試験のデータから、臨床実践で用いられる絶対的EASI値（≤7、≤5、≤3、≤1）での治療効果を検証。
articles.memo: 皮膚科治療薬の効果評価方法として参考程度。当院の診療科目には直接関連せず。

articles.title: Time use, unpaid care work, and income: a nationwide cross-sectional web survey of gender gaps among hospital physicians in Japan.
articles.abstract: Time is the most limited resource in medicine. When unpaid care and domestic work are distributed unevenly by gender, this can alter how physicians work, train, and earn-an international pattern with implications for equity and workforce sustainability. Here, we investigated gender differences in income and daily time allocation for paid work, unpaid care work (housework and child care), and other essential activities. We conducted a cross-sectional web survey of physicians registered with a large Japanese medical portal (m3.com) from January 9 to 31, 2024. Participants were full-time hospital physicians who met the inclusion criteria (n = 2,540; 2,224 men and 316 women). The exposure was physician gender (women vs. men). Outcomes were self-reported daily hours across seven time-use domains-unpaid care work on weekdays and on weekends/holidays (primary), paid work, academic and professional development, commuting, meals and personal care, leisure, and sleep-and personal annual income (≥ ¥15 million vs. < ¥15 million). We estimated adjusted gender differences in time use and the adjusted prevalence ratio for earning ≥ ¥15 million, controlling for key demographic and occupational factors. Response and participation rates could not be calculated because the survey vendor did not disclose the sampling denominator. After multivariable adjustment, women spent more hours on unpaid care work than men on both weekdays (1.51 h/day; 95% confidence interval [CI] 1.31 to 1.70) and weekends/holidays (2.35 h/day; 95% CI 1.98 to 2.72). Women also reported fewer hours in paid work, academic and professional development, and leisure. Women were less likely than men to earn ≥ ¥15 million annually (adjusted prevalence ratio 0.65; 95% CI 0.56 to 0.76). In this cross-sectional sample of full-time hospital physicians in Japan, substantial gender disparities in income and time use remained after adjustment for major demographic and occupational factors. Universal caregiver supports should be designed to encourage and facilitate men's participation, to avoid reinforcing gendered divisions of labor.
articles.authors: Kae Okoshi, Tokoro Yukinari, Fukami Kayo, Hida Koya, Mizuno Ryosuke et al.
articles.summary_ja: 日本の病院勤務医における性別間格差を時間使用、無償ケア労働、収入の観点から調査した全国横断Web調査。2024年1月に実施し、男性2224名、女性316名の常勤医師が参加。7つの時間配分項目で性別による違いを分析。
articles.memo: 医療従事者の働き方に関する参考情報。直接的な経営判断への影響は限定的だが、スタッフ管理の参考になる。

articles.title: Computed tomography-measured trabecular attenuation at first lumbar vertebra as a surrogate marker of bone mineral density and osteoporosis in patients undergoing hemodialysis.
articles.abstract: The risk of fractures and osteoporosis is higher in patients on hemodialysis than in the general population. We examined the association between computed tomography (CT)-measured trabecular attenuation at the first lumbar vertebra (L1 CT-attenuation), bone mineral density (BMD), and osteoporosis in patients on hemodialysis. We retrospectively included Japanese patients on hemodialysis who underwent non-enhanced abdominal CT and dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DEXA) analyses as part of a medical checkup between April 2019 and March 2021. L1 CT-attenuation (Hounsfield units, HU) and BMD of the femoral neck and lumbar spine were measured. We analyzed associations between L1 CT-attenuation and BMD and examined its diagnostic accuracy and odds ratio for detecting osteoporosis, defined as a DEXA T-score of < -2.5 at either site. A total of 119 patients (mean age: 67.2 years; men; 63.0%; body mass index [BMI]: 22.4 ± 3.9 kg/m2) were included, of whom 49 had osteoporosis. L1 CT-attenuation was independently linked to BMD at the femoral neck and lumbar spine. The optimal cutoff derived from receiver operating characteristic curve analysis was 109.3 HU. Thresholds of ≤71.3 HU and ≥151.1 HU provided 90% specificity and 90% sensitivity for distinguishing patients with and without osteoporosis. The age-, sex-, and BMI-adjusted odds ratio of L1 CT-attenuation (per 10 HU) for diagnosing osteoporosis was 0.73. L1 CT-attenuation was independently associated with BMD and may be utilized for osteoporosis screening in Japanese patients on hemodialysis. Opportunistic abdominal CT may aid early detection and intervention for osteoporosis in these patients.
articles.authors: Yajima Takahiro, Kurisawa Ai, Arao Maiko
articles.summary_ja: 血液透析患者におけるCT測定第1腰椎海綿骨濃度を骨密度・骨粗鬆症の代替指標として評価した研究。2019-2021年に腹部CTとDEXAを受けた日本人透析患者を対象に、L1 CT値と骨密度の関連性および骨粗鬆症診断精度を解析。
articles.memo: 透析患者の骨粗鬆症評価に関する知見だが、当院では透析治療を行っておらず直接的関連は薄い。

mhlw.title: 診療報酬改定
mhlw.summary_ja: 診療報酬改定に関する厚生労働省の公式情報。
mhlw.impact: 改定内容を詳細確認し、各診療科の算定要件変更への対応を準備する。
mhlw.memo: 全診療科に影響する重要な制度変更。算定漏れや新要件への対応が経営に直結する。

mhlw.title: 消費税と診療報酬について
mhlw.summary_ja: 消費税と診療報酬の関係について厚生労働省が解説。医療機関の消費税負担と診療報酬での補填に関する内容。
mhlw.impact: 消費税負担の影響を正確に把握し、診療報酬での補填状況を確認する。
mhlw.memo: 消費税負担は医療機関の経営圧迫要因。補填状況の理解は収益管理に重要。

mhlw.title: ジカウイルス感染症
mhlw.summary_ja: 厚生労働省によるジカウイルス感染症に関する情報。
mhlw.memo: 感染症対策の一環として知識を持っておくべき情報だが、日本では現在流行していない。

medscape.title: Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy Tied to Dementia Risk in T2D
medscape.summary_ja: 2型糖尿病患者における糖尿病性末梢神経障害が認知症リスクと関連することが判明。神経障害の早期発見と管理の重要性が示唆される。
medscape.impact: 糖尿病患者の神経障害スクリーニングと認知機能評価の強化が必要。
medscape.memo: 糖尿病専門外来での重要な知見。末梢神経障害の早期発見が認知症予防につながる可能性。

medscape.title: Air Pollution Linked to Reduced Midlife Cognitive Function
medscape.summary_ja: 大気汚染が中年期の認知機能低下と関連するという研究結果が報告された。環境要因が認知機能に与える影響について新たな知見を提供している。
medscape.memo: 高齢患者の認知機能評価や生活指導において、環境要因への注意喚起材料として活用可能性がある。

medscape.title: Brain-Controlled Hearing System Passes First In-Human Trial
medscape.summary_ja: 脳制御による聴覚システムが初回臨床試験を通過した。脳波を利用した革新的な聴覚補助技術として将来的な医療応用が期待される。
medscape.memo: 耳鼻咽喉科で難聴患者の治療において、将来的な治療選択肢として注目すべき技術革新の動向。

medscape.title: Women Show Longer Door-to-Needle Time for Stroke Than Men
medscape.summary_ja: 脳卒中治療において女性は男性よりもドア・ツー・ニードル時間が長いことが判明。性別による治療格差の問題が浮き彫りになった。
medscape.memo: 循環器疾患の診療において性別差を考慮した対応の重要性。救急連携時の参考情報。

medscape.title: Extremely Preterm Birth Tied to Motor Difficulties at Age 12
medscape.summary_ja: 超早産児は12歳時点で運動機能の困難を抱えるリスクが高いことが判明。早産児の長期的な発達フォローアップの重要性が示された。
medscape.memo: 小児科での早産児フォローアップにおける長期的視点の重要性。運動発達評価の参考情報。

medscape.title: PD Risk Significantly Higher With Schizophrenia
medscape.summary_ja: 統合失調症患者ではパーキンソン病発症リスクが有意に高いことが判明。精神疾患と神経変性疾患の関連性が示唆された。
medscape.memo: 内科診療で統合失調症既往患者を診る際の参考情報。神経症状への注意が必要。

medscape.title: Electroacupuncture Promising for Cognitive Improvement in AD
medscape.summary_ja: 電気鍼療法がアルツハイマー病患者の認知機能改善に有望な効果を示すことが判明。補完代替医療の可能性が示唆された。
medscape.memo: 認知症患者への補完療法の選択肢として参考。エビデンスベースの代替治療法情報。

medscape.title: Adjunctive Tirofiban Gains Ground in Stroke
medscape.summary_ja: 脳卒中治療において補助的なチロフィバン使用が有効性を示している。脳血管疾患の治療選択肢として新たな知見が蓄積されている。
medscape.memo: 循環器内科で脳血管疾患リスクの高い患者を診療する際の治療選択肢として参考となる研究動向。

medscape.title: Amantadine Awakens 94-Year-Old Woman After Stroke
medscape.summary_ja: 94歳女性が脳卒中後にアマンタジンにより覚醒したケースが報告された。脳卒中後の意識障害治療における薬物療法の可能性が示された。
medscape.memo: 循環器疾患診療における脳卒中後治療の参考事例。薬物療法による回復可能性の知見。

medscape.title: Primary Care Making More Mental Health Diagnoses for Kids
medscape.summary_ja: プライマリケアにおいて小児の精神保健診断が増加している傾向が報告された。一次医療での精神的ヘルスケアの役割拡大が示唆される。
medscape.impact: 小児科での精神的健康問題への対応体制強化と専門医連携の検討が必要。
medscape.memo: 小児科診療における精神保健の重要性増大。内科での成人移行期支援にも関連する動向。

fierce.title: Hospitals allege contracted CVS Health subsidiaries pocketed their 340B savings
fierce.summary_ja: 病院がCVSヘルス子会社と契約した340Bプログラムの節約分を不正に取得されたと主張している問題。340Bプログラムは低所得者向け医療機関が医薬品を割引価格で購入できる制度。
fierce.memo: 340Bプログラムは主に病院向けで、クリニックには直接的影響は限定的。ただし薬価制度の動向として参考になる。

fierce.title: Freestanding EDs, urgent care acquisition opportunities abound for HCA Healthcare
fierce.summary_ja: HCAヘルスケアが独立型救急部門と緊急ケアセンターの買収機会を拡大している。医療需要の高まりと競争激化により、戦略的買収を通じた事業拡大を図っている。
fierce.memo: 大手病院チェーンの事業戦略。クリニック経営では競合環境の変化として注視が必要。

fierce.title: Study: Brokers increasingly recommending ICHRA to employers
fierce.summary_ja: 保険ブローカーが雇用主に対してICHRA（個人保険範囲医療償還制度）を推奨するケースが増加している。従来の団体保険に代わる新しい従業員医療保険の選択肢として注目されている。
fierce.memo: 米国の医療保険制度変化。日本の医療保険制度とは異なるが、医療費支払い方式の動向として参考。

fierce.title: Allina Health, Sutter Health move closer to $26B combination
fierce.summary_ja: アリーナヘルスとサッターヘルスが260億ドル規模の合併に向けて前進している。大手医療システム同士の統合により、スケールメリットと効率化を図る動き。
fierce.memo: 米国大手医療機関の統合動向。日本でも医療機関の統合・連携が進む中で、業界トレンドとして参考。

fierce.title: Providence to shutter most health plan operations next year
fierce.summary_ja: プロビデンス・ヘルスが来年、健康保険事業の大部分を閉鎖する予定。財務的圧迫により事業の再構築を図っている。
fierce.memo: 米国大手医療機関の事業再編。保険事業撤退は日本のクリニック経営には直接影響しない。

fierce.title: CMS proposes rule aimed at limiting Medicaid state-directed payments
fierce.summary_ja: 米国CMSがメディケイド州直接支払いを制限する規則案を提案。米国の医療保険制度に関する政策変更で、日本の診療報酬制度とは直接関係がない。
fierce.memo: 米国の医療保険制度の話であり、日本のクリニック経営には直接影響しない。海外医療政策の参考程度。

fierce.title: Canvas Medical unveils Canvas Studio, a customizable EMR workflow tool for clinicians
fierce.summary_ja: キャンバスメディカルがカスタマイズ可能な電子カルテワークフローツール「キャンバススタジオ」を発表。臨床医向けに業務効率化を図るEMRソリューション。
fierce.impact: 電子カルテシステムの進化動向として、将来的なシステム更新時の参考にする。
